user.title: Connect to Virtual Lymow mower
user.description: Configure snapshot polling and motion detection.

data_description.mower_name: A friendly name to identify this mower (e.g. Front Garden).
data_description.mower_ip: Enter an IPv4/IPv6 address or DNS hostname of the mower's local web server (examples: 192.168.1.25, fd00::25, mower.local).
data_description.scan_interval: How often to fetch a new camera snapshot from the mower.
data_description.motion_threshold: Minimum image-difference score required to consider the mower as moving.
data_description.unknown_timeout: How long the camera must be unreachable before the status switches to Unknown. Snapshots that fail within this window preserve the last known status.

error.invalid_mower_ip: Enter a valid IP address or hostname (for example 192.168.1.25, fd00::25, or mower.local).

data_description.scan_interval: How often to fetch a new camera snapshot from the mower.
data_description.motion_threshold: Minimum image-difference score required to consider the mower as moving.
data_description.unknown_timeout: How long the camera must be unreachable before the status switches to Unknown. Snapshots that fail within this window preserve the last known status.
